title: tauschia neglecta
intro: Tauschia neglecta, also known as the Mountain Tauschia, is a perennial herb native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Tauschia neglecta include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and alleviate symptoms of anxiety and insomnia. Herbal preparations of Tauschia neglecta include teas, infusions, and tinctures that can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
